title: White Tiger Divine Emperor
content:
White Tiger Divine Emperor
 was the Fifth Generation White Tiger Divine Emperor of the White Tiger Divine Sect.

Background
[
]

During the war against the 
Cultivation Alliance
 and the 
Brilliant Void Cultivation Sect
, the White Tiger Divine Emperor fought bravely but died in battle; his death, 
Black Tortoise Divine Emperor
's betrayal and 
Azure Dragon Divine Emperor
's disappearance ultimately led to the 
Four Divine Sect
's defeat and decline.
